overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a nighttime walk across the Viaduct Bridge toward a gothic castle's main entrance. The scene features historic stone architecture with warm lantern light contrasting against the dark blue winter night sky.

events.description: camera turns left into narrow corridor between castle buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the castle bridge with the great hall visible to the right, approaching a left turn

ornate stone balustrade along the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stone bridge at night, with the great hall's illuminated windows glowing warmly on the right and a round tower visible in the distance on the left. The camera walks forward along the bridge, passing ornate stone railings and lanterns, before turning left into a narrow corridor.

events.description: camera turns right, exiting the corridor back onto the open viaduct bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone corridor between high walls, heading toward the round tower ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall of the castle structure
rough-hewn stone wall of the castle structure
wall-mounted lantern providing warm light
wall-mounted lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with walls on both sides and wall-mounted lanterns providing sparse illumination. The round tower looms ahead at the corridor's end. The great hall building disappears behind as the camera progresses through the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open viaduct bridge with stone balustrades

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor onto the wide viaduct bridge and walking toward the illuminated main entrance

entered.detail: stone seating along the bridge railing
stone seating along the bridge railing
snow-capped peaks visible in the night distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the scene opens onto the wide Viaduct Bridge with the great hall building now directly ahead. Stone benches line both sides of the bridge, and distant mountains are visible on the horizon. The camera walks steadily forward across the expansive stone pavement toward the main entrance.

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge, approaching the grand entrance of the great hall with its tall illuminated windows

entered.detail: ornate circular metal grate set in the stone pavement
tall lamp post flanking the main entrance
tall lamp post flanking the main entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking across the viaduct bridge, getting closer to the great hall's main entrance. The building's gothic facade becomes more prominent, with tall illuminated windows and entrance lanterns visible. A decorative manhole cover appears in the center of the stone pathway as the approach continues.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the upper facade and spires of the great hall

agents.ego_description: approaching the main entrance and looking up at the towering gothic facade and illuminated windows above

entered.detail: large wooden arched doorway with stone surround
tall arched window with diamond lattice panes glowing with warm light
tall arched window with diamond lattice panes glowing with warm light
pointed stone spires atop the building roofline

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera reaches the immediate approach to the great hall's main entrance. The perspective shifts upward to reveal the imposing gothic facade with its tall illuminated windows, stone archway, and pointed spires against the night sky. The wooden entrance door stands centered below the glowing windows as the camera comes to a stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a moonlit stone bridge that transitions from narrow, enclosed passages to the imposing scale of a gothic castle entrance. It begins by walking along a bridge past the glowing windows of a great hall before turning left into a dimly lit, narrow stone corridor where wall-mounted lanterns provide sparse illumination. As the camera exits this enclosed passage, the scene opens back onto the expansive Viaduct Bridge, revealing stone benches and distant mountains on the horizon. The perspective then moves steadily forward across the stone pavement, passing a decorative manhole cover as the building's gothic facade and tall illuminated windows grow more prominent. Finally, the camera reaches the main entrance and tilts upward to reveal the towering stone archways and pointed spires set against the dark night sky.
